title: Rich Nutty Vietnamese Provola Noodles
description: A nutty and snappy Vietnamese dish featuring provola, perfect for a date night, made with ayurvedic-sattvic-friendly ingredients. This dish is both delicious and healthy.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions.
In a small saucepan, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat.
Add the grated ginger to the saucepan and cook for 1 minute.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce and honey until well combined.
Add the soy sauce mixture to the saucepan and cook for 2 minutes.
Stir in the chopped peanuts and cook for 1 minute.
Drain the cooked noodles and add them to the saucepan, tossing to coat with the sauce.
Divide the noodles among four plates and top each plate with sliced provola cheese.
Garnish with chopped scallions and serve immediately.
